description: This file is the main entry point for a Flutter application. It sets up the app with Material Design, defines the main widget MyApp, and a home page MyHomePage that displays a loading message with a progress indicator.

classes.name: MyApp
classes.description: StatelessWidget that initializes the MaterialApp with theme and home page.

classes.name: MyHomePage
classes.description: StatefulWidget that represents the main screen with a title property.

classes.name: _MyHomePageState
classes.description: State class for MyHomePage that builds the UI with an AppBar and centered loading message.

methods.name: main
methods.description: Application entry point that runs the MyApp widget.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Build method for MyApp and _MyHomePageState that constructs the UI components.

methods.name: createState
methods.description: Creates the mutable state for MyHomePage.
